title: Effect Berries
description: More Berries, each with its own Effect
body:
In this I have made 33 kinds of berries, each one corresponding to an effect in vanilla Minecraft. The bushes apply a short period of each effect, the berries last longer, and there are new pies for each berry, which lasts even longer. 4 seconds, 15 seconds, and 1.5 minutes respectively.

There is also a new villager that will trade all the berries to you. You must craft the workstation as it will not be in any villages naturally.

Curseforge:
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/effect-berries
